subject: Blocky Noise2Map output
body:
Hi All,

I am trying out Noise2Map on a dataset and seeing a weird output, where we
have some blocks that seem to have denoised incredibly well while others
are getting blurrier. And I do mean blocks - the difference is happening in
20 and 120 pixel squares. I have attached a screenshot showing the
difference with just deconvolution.
[image: image.png]

My command is: `Noise2Map.exe --observation1 odd --observation2 even
--observation_combined . --dont_flatten_spectrum --iterations 10000
--keep_dimensions --angpix 13`

Using a recent nightly, if that matters!

Thanks, Ben
